hero.title: We assemble games from clacking *keys*, *parchment*, and *pixel*.
hero.body: Vitruvian Construct is a small studio designing experiences-- part renaissance sketch, part tactile mechanism. The Archive below is incomplete. This is intentional.

manifesto.heading:
We treat the studio
as a *workshop*,
and every game as a
*living system*.
manifesto.body: Vitruvian Construct is an independent studio crafting engaging,intriguing narrative games that feel less like products and more like artefacts — pulled from a workshop somewhere between a renaissance bottega and a cabinet of curiosities.  With an emphasis on craftsmanship, mechanical depth, and structural mystery, every project is built to be pulled apart and explored.
manifesto.caption: Plate I — study, reaching hands

fragments_section.heading:
Fragments from the world,
recovered *out of order*.

channels_section.heading:
Stand inside the
*inner circle*.
channels_section.intro: We keep our channels few and slow on purpose. Pick a door. Each one opens onto a different angle of the same workshop.

reddit.title: Join the Discussion on Reddit
reddit.copy: Connect with the team and fellow builders. Share feedback, view early sketches, and dig into the project logs.

discord.title: Join the Discord
discord.copy: We're a small community, talk with the creative team behind our projects! Devlogs, sketches, and the occasional buried artefact.

itch.io.title: Find our work on itch.io
itch.io.copy: Early prototypes, design demos, and vertical slices.

kickstarter.title: Follow on Kickstarter
kickstarter.copy: Sign up to be notified when the blueprints are finalized and the campaign goes live.

patreon.title: Support on Patreon
patreon.copy: Behind-the-scenes logs, full-resolution design sketches, and early access to the development workshop.

footer.studio_blurb: An independent studio assembling games like field notebooks. Built in draughty rooms with very good lighting.

newsletter.comment: Sign up at https://formspree.io/, create a form, then paste your endpoint here (e.g. https://formspree.io/f/xxxxxxx). Until set, the form will show a friendly message.
